title: Best Film Editing Odds | Oscar Predictions, Favorites, 2026 Academy Awards Betting Guide
text: One Battle After Another leads as the heavy favorite at 81% to win Best Film Editing. The remaining contenders include F1 at 14%, Sinners at 8%, Marty Supreme at 2%, and Sentimental Value at 1%. According to analyst Collin Whitchurch, One Battle After Another will win with no betting recommendation against the favorite. Whitchurch notes that One Battle After Another defeated Sinners at the BAFTAs head-to-head. While Sinners won the ACE Eddie Awards in the Drama category, that category is considered more predictive of Oscars success, yet the BAFTA result outweighs this advantage. F1's Critics Choice Award win is not deemed sufficient to warrant wagering. Prediction markets like Kalshi and sportsbooks including DraftKings and FanDuel offer Oscar betting. The 98th Academy Awards ceremony takes place March 15, 2026, at the Dolby Theatre, hosted by Conan O'Brien on ABC.
